历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 1387 → 1262 → 1019 → 1041, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In 2024, it reached a recent high of 1019, then slightly moved back to 1041 in 2025, with a fluctuation of about 22 positions in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1041. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category/Science in Ningxia was 24 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 30 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 27, a decrease of 3 (10% reduction) compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been stable at 33–34 from 2021 to 2026, with a slight upward trend in recent years, indicating strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident that may slightly affect application psychology. It ranks 23rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, showing a certain level of attention. There is no obvious record of major admission gaps historically. Civil Engineering is A+, Electrical Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-, highlighting outstanding engineering strength, with Electrical and Mechanical majors highly aligned with current popular directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are highly popular and recommended, closely matching Chongqing University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of examinees in Ningxia in 2026 is approximately 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (Physics Category 44,491 + History Category 21,406 ≈ 65,897), indicating a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 1041, the 2026 plan's 10% reduction in enrollment (intensified competition), and the basically unchanged total number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 984, with a range of 836–1132.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Vehicle Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 836–1132, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<836), you can focus on sprinting for the Excellence Program or Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>1132), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 with Tier 2 as a supplement.
